name: Sweet Potatoes and Broccoli
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the sweet potato and cook in 1/2 cup water covered until almost done.
2. Add the broccoli and cook until tender. You may need to add more water.
3. Stir in the cottage cheese and sesame seeds until blended.
(Note: Serving size = 362 calories; 2 protein, 2 vegetables, 2 bread, 1 fat. Protein = 22g; Fat = 4g; Carbohydrates = 48g from "Vegetarian Cooking for Diabetics".)
